chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2440 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.10511/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.03.2025 Mr. Suneel Ali Memon, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, notice has been issued herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks for notice to be adjudicated vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid, no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for the respondent department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
